result.summary: Found 2 visually noticeable layout issues: several game tiles are clipped off the right edge, and one top category tab label is truncated. No critical blocking problems are visible.

issues.description: Game carousels/grids in both the "BetRivers Exclusive Games" and "Top Played New Games" sections are cut off on the right side, leaving the third column partially visible and unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid/slider widths and padding so cards fit within the viewport, or make the overflow clearly scrollable with proper snapping and visible affordance.

issues.description: The top navigation tab on the right is truncated, showing only "Hot Ga" instead of the full label.
issues.suggestion: Widen the tab, reduce label text size, or enable horizontal scrolling so the full category name is visible.
